title: ECAI
note: 2018 and 2022 data from IJCAI-ECAI joint proceedings (papers cross-filed under conf/ijcai/ in DBLP). Paper counts for these years include both ECAI and IJCAI papers.

2018.note: ECAI 2018 was joint IJCAI-ECAI. Papers cross-filed under conf/ijcai/ in DBLP. 870 papers copied from IJCAI data.

2022.note: ECAI 2022 was joint IJCAI-ECAI. Papers cross-filed under conf/ijcai/ in DBLP. 863 papers copied from IJCAI data.
